title: Simply Optimized & Up to Date
description: A Simply Optimized continuation, updated for the latest Minecraft versions and optimization mods while staying lightweight and performance-focused. Supports 1.16.5 → 26.1.2
body:
## Welcome to **Simply Optimized & Up to Date** ✷

[![SO&UTD Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IWnOJA2V/images/89b4cc063fa2b0bb37d889cc4d457173443c478d.png)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/origins)

**Simply Optimized & Up to Date** is a continuation of the original **Simply Optimized** modpack, a lightweight, well-researched, performance-focused Minecraft modpack built around **pure optimization**. When the original project by HyperSoop was discontinued, this fork was created by **theoclouds** to keep the pack up to date with the latest Minecraft and Fabric performance mods while preserving the same minimal, performance-first philosophy.

This pack provides a base of the best optimization mods available, configured for maximum performance and maintainability. Little to no quality-of-life features, visual enhancements, or gameplay changes are included by default. You are free to add your own mods on top.

### ✷ **Features**

* Core performance mods (Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, Entity Culling, Starlight, and more)
* Updated to support **26.1** with the latest compatible mod versions
* Pure performance focus with no unnecessary extras
* Vanilla gameplay preserved
* Excellent baseline for adding your preferred quality-of-life mods

### ✷ **Installation**

1. Download **Simply Optimized & Up to Date** from Modrinth
2. Use a Fabric-compatible launcher (Modrinth App, Prism, GDLauncher, or MultiMC)
3. Run and enjoy optimized Minecraft
